mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsPblancApplyChklstDao.select */ select apply_id , chklst_id , ceck_result_div_cd , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_chklst where apply_id = #{applyId}

/** UsptBsnsPblancApplyChklstDao.selectList */ select ubpac.chklst_id , ubc.chklst_cn , ubpac.ceck_result_div_cd from uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_chklst ubpac inner join uspt_bsns_chklst ubc on ubc.chklst_id = ubpac.chklst_id where ubpac.apply_id = #{applyId}
